title: hieracium praecurrens subsp. pelesii
intro: Hieracium praecurrens subsp. pelesii, also known as a type of hawkweed, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). This plant is used in herbal medicine for its purported medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which may help alleviate digestive issues, fever, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Hieracium praecurrens subsp. pelesii include reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and promoting wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and roots are typically used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed orally to harness its potential health benefits.
